subHeadline: The comparisons BMW buyers actually want — generation vs generation, engine vs engine, model vs model. Honest, data-backed, and built for real-world decision-making.

comparisons.title: E90 vs F30 vs G20 3 Series
comparisons.preview: Which 3 Series generation to buy — the verdict on reliability, running costs, and long-term value. The F30 LCI (2016+) is the sweet spot; the E90 is the bargain-with-risk; the G20 is the safest.

comparisons.title: N47 vs B47 Diesel
comparisons.preview: The chain-tensioner risk vs the revised architecture. N47: 1,450 enquiries in 2025, mostly timing chain [BMW-VERIFIED]. B47: 930 enquiries, significantly lower failure rate [BMW-VERIFIED]. The B47 wins on reliability; the N47 wins on purchase price — but only with documented chain history.

comparisons.title: B58 vs N55 Petrol
comparisons.preview: The modern straight-six vs its twin-scroll predecessor. B58: 540 enquiries, well-understood cooling issues [BMW-VERIFIED]. N55: pattern-data tier, solid but older. The B58 is more reliable; the N55 is cheaper to buy. Both are better than the N54's HPFP woes.

comparisons.title: 3 Series vs 5 Series
comparisons.preview: Which offers better value for money over 3-5 years — the compact saloon or the executive estate? They share engines, so buy on condition, not badge. The 5 Series is heavier but more refined; the 3 Series is lighter and more agile. Both are excellent if you pick the right engine.

comparisons.title: X3 vs X5
comparisons.preview: The mid-size SUV vs the large SUV — which one should you own? X3 F25: 316 enquiries [BMW-VERIFIED]. X5 F15: 288 enquiries [BMW-VERIFIED]. The X3 is cheaper to run; the X5 offers more space. Both share engines — choose based on your space needs, not reliability.

comparisons.title: Petrol vs Diesel Running Costs
comparisons.preview: Which fuel type is cheaper to own in 2026? Diesel: better motorway economy but higher DPF/EGR maintenance. Petrol: lower purchase price (used market) but higher fuel costs. The B47 diesel is the motorway champion; the B48 petrol is the urban winner.

bottomCta.text: Not sure which is right for you? Use our diagnostic tool to get a personalised verdict in minutes.
